description: First-pass flexbox (row): flex-grow equal columns, fixed flex-basis + grow, gap, justify-content.
visual_assertions: Three equal-width cards (flex:1) sit side by side with a gap between them.
A fixed 120pt column sits left of a growing column that fills the remaining width.
The justify-content:flex-end row pushes its two chips to the right edge.
KNOWN LIMIT: inline (<span>) flex items are not laid out as flex items yet.
